ab: namadraudrw aken a kemacu tua inpic.
en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: ku pasedjamai sun.
en: I can lend you.

ab: namadraudraw aken a kemacu ta ku qecap.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: inika ken a nakemacu uta, vaiki a veneli.
en: B: I don’t have one either, let’s go buy one.

ab: bulai a vaik itjen a venli ta inpic?
en: A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: bulai, uri venli aken uta ta siulaulau.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: bulai a vaik itjen a venli ta tja kenamain?
en: A: Let’s go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: ini, nakeman aken i tjumaq.
en: B: No, I’ve already eaten at home.

ab: namadraudraw aken a semljec tua ku bintu.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: kirimu sau seljecu!
en: B: Take it to the heat!

ab: namadraudraw ken a kemacu tua ku bintu.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: pai numayan tjakanau anga ku bintu!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let’s eat my lunch box together!

ab: anem su kanen nu sikecengcengelj?
en: A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: uri keman aken ta cenglej nagakku.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: anema su kanen nu sikecengcengelj?
en: A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: nakemacu aken tucu a qadaw ta bintu, tjakanau anga nu sikecengcengelj!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I’ve brought a lunchbox today, let’s eat together at noon!

ab: bulai a vaik itjen a benulu ta lanciu?
en: A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?

ab: bulai! ari vaiki.
en: B: Okay! Let’s go.

ab: bulai a vaik itjen a benulu ta pangeciu?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: ini, uri kitulu aken.
en: B: No, I want to study.

ab: alapan aken tua suapan.
en: A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: uii, kusipavayan aicu a suapan tjanusun.
en: B: Okay, here’s a broomstick for you.

ab: alapan aken ta zuking uii?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: semuasuap aken, alapan aken ayau ti Kapi.
en: B: I’m sweeping the floor and you asked Kapi to carry it for you.

ab: makasuap anga sun?
en: A: Are you done sweeping?

ab: makasuap anga ken.
en: B: I swept it.

ab: aku inika sun a semuap?
en: A: Why don’t you clean up?

ab: makasuap anga ken.
en: B: I’ve finished cleaning up.

ab: kungakungai aravac a kasintan, sau zukingu anan.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: uii, vaik aken a malap ta zuking.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go get the cloth.

ab: kungakungai aravac azua qezung, sau djuasi anan.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: mayanan, inianan a ku pakasuap taimaza.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I’m not done sweeping here yet.

ab: uri kemuda anga sun nusauni?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: uri vaik aken a kemin ta sinsi.
en: B: I’m going to see my teacher.

ab: uri kemuda anga sun nuvaik anga sun i gakku?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: uri vaik aken a semnai katua ku qali.
en: B: I’m going to sing with my friends.

ab: uri kemuda anga timadju nuvaik i gakku?
en: A: What’s he doing after school?

ab: uri vaik timadju a ljemangui.
en: B: He’s going swimming.
